_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: AI + Hardware Link
subtitle: smart machines in the real world!
overview: This session introduces students to how Artificial Intelligence connects with hardware devices such as sensors, robots, microcontrollers, and smart systems. Students explore how AI can interact with the physical world through cameras, motors, sensors, and embedded devices.

images._note: Add photos of robots, sensors, Arduino/Raspberry Pi setups, AI cameras, and smart hardware projects.

gallery._placeholder: ADD: AI robot or robotics project image
gallery.caption: AI-powered robots can interact with the environment

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Arduino or Raspberry Pi setup photo
gallery.caption: Microcontrollers help connect software with hardware
Sensors collect real-world data for AI systems

gallery._placeholder: ADD: AI camera or vision system image
gallery.caption: AI cameras can recognize faces and objects

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Smart home IoT system photo
gallery.caption: Smart devices communicate using AI and IoT
Hands-on learning makes AI and hardware exciting
Future machines may combine AI, robotics, and automation

keyTopics: What is Hardware? — Physical electronic components and devices
AI + Hardware Integration — Smart systems that sense and act
Computer Vision — AI cameras recognizing objects
IoT (Internet of Things) — Connected smart devices
Robotics — Machines controlled using AI and sensors

youtubeVideos.desc: Introduction to how AI works with hardware and electronics.

youtubeVideos.title: Arduino for Beginners
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how Arduino controls sensors and devices.

youtubeVideos.title: Robotics and AI Explained
youtubeVideos.desc: How robots use sensors, AI, and automation.

activity.title: Build a Smart Sensor System
steps: Connect a sensor to the microcontroller
Add an LED or buzzer output
Write simple logic for sensor detection
Test how the hardware responds automatically
Discuss how AI can improve the system further

quiz.explanation: Hardware includes physical devices like sensors, motors, computers, and robots.
Arduino is a popular microcontroller used in electronics and robotics.
Sensors detect light, motion, temperature, distance, and other environmental data.

quiz.q: Which is an example of an actuator?
quiz.explanation: Actuators perform actions such as movement, sound, or lighting.
IoT connects smart devices through the internet.

quiz.q: How does AI help hardware systems?
options: By making devices smarter and automated
quiz.explanation: AI allows devices to analyze data and make intelligent decisions.

quiz.q: Which technology helps AI systems recognize images?
quiz.explanation: Computer Vision enables AI systems to understand images and videos.

options: A machine that can perform programmed tasks
quiz.explanation: Robots are machines designed to carry out tasks automatically.

quiz.q: Why are AI-powered smart homes useful?
quiz.explanation: Smart homes use AI and IoT to automate lighting, security, appliances, and more.

quiz.q: What skill is important for building AI hardware projects?
quiz.explanation: AI hardware projects combine coding, creativity, and problem-solving skills.
